title: Compiler fails to initialize array value for vvp

features.name: ternary index on unpacked array with out_of_bounds value
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array indexed by a ternary expression where the index value can exceed the array bounds

features.name: single element unpacked array with minimal index
features.description: Code should include a single-element unpacked array indexed with a multi-bit constant that exceeds the array dimension
